kirundi.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Igikoresho cyo gushushanya fonction. Amahinguriro ya keyboard: 1 kugeza 6 bitoranya ubwoko bwa fonction, D derivée, A ubuso, T imbonerahamwe, L kwiga.
kirundi.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Aho fonction inyura ku murongo x. Kuri izi ngingo, f(x) = 0. Gushaka imizi ni ingenzi muri algèbre na calcul.
kirundi.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Aho fonction inyura ku murongo y. Iyi ni agaciro ka f(0) — shyiramo gusa x = 0.
kirundi.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Umanuko ukubwira uko fonction imanuka ku ngingo iyo ari yo yose. Umurongo tangent ukora ku murongo ugoramye ku ngingo imwe gusa. Koresha trace slider kugira ngo ushakashake!
kirundi.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivée ipima igipimo cy'impinduka. Yifungure kugira ngo urabe uko umanuko uhinduka ku fonction. Aho f′(x) = 0, fonction ifite agaciro gakomeye canke gato k'ahantu.
kirundi.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Ahantu hijimye hagaragaza intégrale — «ihurizwahamwe» rusange rya f(x). Mu buzima nyabwo, ibi bishobora gusobanura intera yagenzwe, ingufu zakoreshejwe, canke ubushobozi.
kirundi.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Iyo a > 0, parabole ifungura hejuru (⏣). Iyo a < 0, ifungura hasi (⏢). Sommet ni ingingo yo guhindukira. Gerageza guhindura 'a' kugira ngo urabe!
kirundi.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) igenzura uburebure, fréquence (b) igenzura umubare wa cycles, naho phase shift (c) yimura umuraba ibumoso/iburyo. Période = 2π/b.
kirundi.v_shaped_absolute_value: Agaciro nyako gafite ishusho ya V
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: hakoreshejwe amagambo yoroshye ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi, nta magambo y'ubuhanga
kirundi.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: ku munyeshuri w'amashuri yisumbuye muri algèbre canke pré-calcul, hamwe n'amagambo nka umanuko, aho inyura, sommet, période, na amplitude
kirundi.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Kanda «Sobanura» kugira ngo mwarimu AI asobanure iyi fonction ku rwego rwo gusoma watoranije.
kirundi.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Zoo ya fonction — imiterere itandatu isanzwe ya fonction
kirundi.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders za amplitude, fréquence, phase. Icyiciro discrète cy'imimerere 5. Nta manota, nta kugaragaza.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Igitekerezo: Ni gute phase shift igira ingaruka ku muraba ugaragara?
kirundi.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Rondera amagenamiterere abiri akora imiraba isa mu maso.
kirundi.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Sobanura uko buri paramètre ishushanya umuraba sinus.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso discrète cy'imimerere 5; nta manota y'umuraba; nta kugaragaza — ku bushake bw'igishushanyo.
